things.name: Verona Arena
things.description: Perfectly preserved Roman amphitheatre hosting world-class summer opera performances

things.name: Juliet's House (Casa di Giulietta)
things.description: Medieval courtyard with balcony and bronze statue beloved by Romeo and Juliet fans

things.name: Piazza delle Erbe
things.description: Colourful daily market in the former Roman forum with magnificent Baroque fountain

things.name: Castelvecchio
things.description: Scaligeri castle converted to an outstanding art museum by Carlo Scarpa

things.name: Basilica di San Zeno
things.description: Finest Romanesque church in Northern Italy with Mantegna's remarkable altarpiece

things.name: Roman Theatre
things.description: 1st-century BC theatre on the hill across the Adige with Archaeological Museum

things.name: Ponte Scaligero
things.description: Striking 14th-century crenellated bridge with three arches over the Adige

things.name: Torre dei Lamberti
things.description: 12th-century tower offering the best panoramic views over the city

things.name: Giardino Giusti
things.description: Renaissance garden with cypress trees, labyrinth and views from the belvedere

things.name: Duomo di Verona
things.description: Cathedral with a Romanesque porch and Titian's Assumption of the Virgin
